name: Lemon Bar Mix
plain_text_description:
Introducing our new Lemon Bar Mix!
You asked, and we listened: enjoy delicious lemon bars whenever the craving strikes with our Lemon Bar Mix! This delightful mix delivers a perfect balance of sweet and tart flavors, featuring zesty lemon paired with a crunchy shortbread crust that melts in your mouth. Whether enjoyed as a midday treat, a refreshing dessert after dinner, or a crowd-pleaser at gatherings, these lemon bars are incredibly easy to make and are sure to brighten any occasion. Just add a few simple ingredients, bake, and savor the sunshine in every bite!
Serving suggestion: Add powdered sugar for a festive presentation!
ingredients: Cane Sugar, King Arthur Unbleached Flour (wheat flour, enzyme), Lemon Juice Powder (maltodextrin, lemon juice concentrate), Wheat Starch, Citric Acid, Sea Salt.
details: Includes Lemon Filling mix and Crust mix.
Directions included for making the mix into cheesecake bars.
